User.title: User Profile and Configuration State
User.description: Stores user configuration, device settings, logs, and Sweety conversational memory logs.

systemLogs.description: Sub-array of recent system event traces

customAvatarUrl.description: User uploaded custom base64 avatar URL or null

chatHistory.description: Sequence of completed conversational exchanges (memories) with Sweety

Login.title: User Login Record
Login.description: Logs daily user login attempts for developer analytics tracking.

email.description: Email address of the logging user

/users/{userId}.description: Access-controlled user documents holding system state, settings, logs, and memories.

/logins/{loginId}.description: Daily user logins recorded to compute metrics and counts of unique active users per day.
